name: Shandong Humon Smelting Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Humon Smelting Co., Ltd. engages in the exploration, mining, selection, and smelting of gold in China. It also produces silver, cathode copper, electrolytic lead, vitriol, and liquid sulfur dioxide. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Yantai, China.
